languages.original_text: "I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."

languages.text: "Советовал бы вам, генетор, тщательнее выбирать объекты своих изысканий. Некоторые явления не стоят того, чтобы знать о них больше дозволенного".
"I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."
languages.original_text: "Советовал бы вам, генетор, тщательнее выбирать объекты своих изысканий. Некоторые явления не стоят того, чтобы знать о них больше дозволенного".

traits.locale_text: "I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."
"I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."
"I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."

languages.text: «Genetor, le recomendaría que elija sus sujetos de estudio con más cuidado. En el caso de ciertos fenómenos, buscar más conocimiento del permitido solo le traerá problemas».
languages.original_text: "I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."

traits.locale_text: «Genetor, le recomendaría que elija sus sujetos de estudio con más cuidado. En el caso de ciertos fenómenos, buscar más conocimiento del permitido solo le traerá problemas».

languages.text: 「研究対象を選ぶ際には、もっと慎重になるよう忠告する、ゲネター。ある種の現象については、許された以上の知識を求めることは、労に値しない」
languages.original_text: "I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."

traits.locale_text: 「研究対象を選ぶ際には、もっと慎重になるよう忠告する、ゲネター。ある種の現象については、許された以上の知識を求めることは、労に値しない」

languages.text: “我建议你在选择研究对象时多加小心，基因士。有些现象所能带来的知识，并不值得为之触犯禁忌。”
languages.original_text: "I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."

traits.locale_text: “我建议你在选择研究对象时多加小心，基因士。有些现象所能带来的知识，并不值得为之触犯禁忌。”

languages.text: "Ich würde Euch raten, bei der Wahl Eurer Subjekten wählerischer zu sein, Genetor. Bei gewissen Phänomenen ist die Suche nach verbotenem Wissen nämlich den Ärger nicht wert."
languages.original_text: "I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."

traits.locale_text: "Ich würde Euch raten, bei der Wahl Eurer Subjekten wählerischer zu sein, Genetor. Bei gewissen Phänomenen ist die Suche nach verbotenem Wissen nämlich den Ärger nicht wert."

languages.text: « Je vous conseille davantage de prudence dans le choix de vos sujets, genetor. Parfois, rechercher des connaissances interdites n'en vaut pas les ennuis qui s'ensuivent. »
languages.original_text: "I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous conseille davantage de prudence dans le choix de vos sujets, genetor. Parfois, rechercher des connaissances interdites n'en vaut pas les ennuis qui s'ensuivent. »

languages.text: "Deneklerinizi seçerken daha dikkatli olmanızı tavsiye ederim Genetör. Bazı fenomenler için izin verilenden daha fazla bilgi aramak zahmete değmez."
languages.original_text: "I would advise you to take more care in choosing your subjects, Genetor. For certain phenomena, seeking greater knowledge than what is permitted is not worth the trouble."

traits.locale_text: "Deneklerinizi seçerken daha dikkatli olmanızı tavsiye ederim Genetör. Bazı fenomenler için izin verilenden daha fazla bilgi aramak zahmete değmez."
